scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist'); ['index.html', 'app.js', 'style.css', 'channels.json'].forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, 'dist/'+f)); if(fs.existsSync('assets')) fs.cpSync('assets', 'dist/assets', {recursive:true})"
